project_type: Vite + React 18 + TypeScript SPA with Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, Supabase (optional cloud sync), deployed to Netlify
build_system: Vite 5 with tsc -b for type checking; npm scripts: dev, build, preview, lint
test_framework: No test framework configured - verification is via tsc and vite build
verification_instructions: Run `npx tsc -b --noEmit` to check types, then `npx vite build` to confirm production build succeeds
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. Netlify Edge Functions use Deno runtime (server-side). No test suite exists.
contribution_requirements: Branch fix/security-mobile-overhaul from main. Run tsc and vite build after changes. Keep existing patterns (Tailwind classes, Framer Motion, Lucide icons).
key_patterns: Components in src/components/. Context providers in src/context/. Services in src/services/. Utils in src/utils/. Supabase client in src/lib/supabase.ts. Auth hook in src/lib/auth.ts. Static designs in src/data/designs.ts. Custom designs loaded via CustomDesignsContext. Admin panel lazy-loaded. The ABOUT_IMG uses pexels(3852974) - a Black woman seamstress at sewing machine.
directory_structure: src/ contains App.tsx (root), components/ (all UI), context/ (React contexts), data/ (static catalog), lib/ (supabase, auth), services/ (designsService, geminiChat, analytics, newsletterService), utils/ (constants, whatsapp, images, scroll, chatbot, categoryLabel, imageResize, sanitize). public/ has _redirects, favicon, manifest. netlify.toml has build config + security headers.
